entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateOppressorDescription
entry.value: The Tank Commander equips an Oppressor Cannon with a coaxial Autocannon as its primary weapons.

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateOppressorFlavor
entry.value: "We will crush them with Imperial steel!"

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateTwink
entry.value: Equip Primary Armament: Twin Battle Cannon

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateTwinkDescription
entry.value: The Tank Commander equips an anti-infantry Twin Battle Cannon as its primary weapons

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateTwinkFlavor
entry.value: "When one Battle Cannon isn't enough, use more gun."

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateSecondaryCastigator
entry.value: Equip Secondary Armament: Castigator Gatling Cannon

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateSecondaryCastigatorDescription
entry.value: The Tank Commander equips an anti-infantry cannon as its secondary weapon.

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateSecondaryCastigatorFlavor
entry.value: "When that barrel starts spinning, men start falling."

entry.name: AstraMilitarum/uwu_RogalDornTankCommander_ActivateSecondaryPulveriserDescription
entry.value: The Tank Commander equips a smaller cannon as its secondary weapon.
